title: QA_RAMAN_KNN_RESULTS_CERT
description: Locks in verified LOO kNN results for the QA Raman spectroscopy classifier. Certifies the headline accuracy, k-sweep table, and per-class breakdown from qa_knn_baseline.py against the frozen features artifact.

cert_id.description: Human-readable identifier for this certificate instance.

artifact.description: Provenance of the frozen features CSV used in all experiments.

csv_path.description: Relative path to the features CSV from the paper submission root.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the features CSV file (raw bytes).

n_features.description: Number of feature columns used by qa_knn_baseline.py.

classifier.description: Configuration of the best LOO kNN configuration.

best_accuracy.description: Headline overall LOO accuracy at best_k with this weighting scheme.

k_sweep.description: Full k-sweep table (each k × weighting combination).

per_class_accuracies.description: Per-class LOO accuracy at best_k (weighted). Keys are material class names.

chi2_statistic.description: Chi-squared statistic for C_mod24 vs class dependence test.

model_assessment.description: Validity assessment of the classifier model.

model_valid.description: True if the classifier produces valid, reproducible results.

model_not_physically_realizable.description: True if the model violates physical realizability constraints (e.g. unconstrained quantum correlators). Must be False for a valid kNN classifier.

canonical_sha256.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys, no spaces) with this field zeroed to 64 zeros.
